basic_details.job_title: NHM Nagpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Staff Nurse and MPW-Male Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Health Mission Nagpur (NHM Nagpur) Staff Nurse / MPW-Male Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NHM Nagpur. A total of 11 vacancies have been announced through the NHM Nagpur Staff Nurse / MPW-Male Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 43 years Age Relaxation: 43 years (Backward classes) / 38 years (Open)

qualification.education_qualification: GNM, B.Sc Nursing, HSC Science, Health Worker Male Training, Sanitary Inspector Course
qualification.details: Staff Nurse: GNM & Registration from Maharashtra Nursing Council or B.Sc Nursing MPW-Male: HSC (Science stream) or equivalent and Health Worker (Male) training from recognized institute or Sanitary Inspector course

salary_details.details: Staff Nurse: Rs. 18,000/- - Rs. 20,000/- Per Month MPW-Male: Rs. 18,000/- - Rs. 20,000/- Per Month

selection_process: Merit List (50 marks for qualifying exam %
30 marks for experience) Skill Assessment (if mandatory for the post) Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NHM Nagpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHM Nagpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NHM Nagpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application for NHM Nagpur Recruitment 2026 is 10th May 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Staff Nurse and MPW-Male posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies. Out of these, 4 vacancies are for the Staff Nurse post and 7 vacancies are for the MPW-Male post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: For the Staff Nurse position, candidates must possess a GNM degree and be registered with the Maharashtra Nursing Council, or hold a B.Sc Nursing degree.

faq.question: Q4. What are the eligibility criteria for the MPW-Male post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the MPW-Male post, candidates need to have passed HSC (Science stream) or an equivalent examination, along with a Health Worker (Male) training certificate from a recognized institute or a Sanitary Inspector course.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 43 years. Age relaxation is provided for backward classes (43 years) and open category candidates (38 years).

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for both Staff Nurse and MPW-Male posts will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 18,000/- to Rs. 20,000/-.

faq.question: Q7. How will the candidates be selected for the NHM Nagpur posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes the creation of a Merit List based on qualifying exam percentage, higher qualification, and experience. A Skill Assessment and Document Verification may also be conducted.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for NHM Nagpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 150/- for General/OBC category candidates and Rs. 100/- for SC/ST category candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contract-based job?
faq.answer: Yes, the job type for this recruitment is on a contract basis, with the contract period extending up to 29th June 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website is also provided for further information.

faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application for NHM Nagpur Recruitment 2026 is 10th May 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.
